# M Street Music — Professional Recording Studio

> M Street Music is a professional recording studio located in Krapina, Croatia, offering recording, mixing, mastering, and private music mentorship services.

## Key Facts

- Owner & Engineer: Kristijan Sinkovic, Master of Music (University of Zagreb), SSL Console Certified Engineer, 20 years of experience
- Location: Magistratska 21/1, 49000 Krapina, Croatia (55 km from Zagreb)
- Services: Recording (EUR 35/hr), Mixing (from EUR 200/song), Mastering (EUR 50/song), Stem Mastering (EUR 60/song)
- Specialization: Music optimized for Spotify and streaming platforms
- Equipment: Dangerous Music D-Box+, Tegeler Audio Manufaktur Creme, SSL Fusion, Universal Audio Apollo x6, FabFilter, iZotope Ozone 12
- Mentorship: Private 1-on-1 programs in music production, mixing, composition, and audio engineering
- Languages: Croatian, English
- Contact: info@mstreetmusic.hr | +385 91 305 0910
- Website: https://mstreetmusic.hr (Croatian) | https://mstreetmusic.hr/en (English)
- Social: Instagram @mstreetmusic | YouTube @mstreetmusic | TikTok @mstreetmusic

## Notable Clients

David Temelkov, Sarmeri, Grupa Motiv, Danijel Kranjec, Iva & Ella Ranogajec

## Blog Topics

Recording tips, mixing techniques, mastering for streaming, studio vs home recording, audio production education
